name: Blessed Are the Gamblers
text:
Whenever you roll one or more dice or flip one or more coins, you gain 2 life. Faith rewards the brave and the reckless equally.
Whenever an opponent rolls one or more dice or flips one or more coins, put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock. Their luck is our omen.
flavorText: "Blessed are the gamblers, for they shall hasten the end and tip generously."

extras.interaction: profits from all gambling, opponent rolls feed the clock
